title: Wildflowers GUI
description: A peaceful GUI inspired by the 25w02a snapshot that includes wildflowers !
body:
_Hello there !_

I'm back to introduce my new GUI. It is based on the latest snapshot (25w02a) that includes wildflowers and other cool stuff.

I made a light blue GUI with some yellow little wildflowers, and turquoise container titles !

The original pack is made for **Java 1.21**. If for some reasons, you need to use it to play with more recent versions of the game, you can dezip the file, open the **"pack.mcmeta"** document in a text editor and edit the number after **"pack_format":**.

For Java 1.21, it's **34**. For Java 1.21.4, it's **46**. (For the 25w02a snapshot, it is **47**.)

You can find these informations on the minecraft wiki with [this link](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Pack_format#List_of_resource_pack_formats).

Don't forget to **save the changes** and **re-zip** the file before putting it back in the resourcepacks folder !
